title: CMPE 281 - Assignment: Serverless CRUD API with DynamoDB

section_anchors.text: AWS Lambda: Executes Python code without managing servers and scales automatically for intermittent traffic.
The remaining PUT and DELETE branches follow the same event shape, updating or deleting the record after a key lookup.
Figure 2. Sample POST request used to add a new record.
GET /students?student_id=100 missing key error message 404 Not Found
Returning clear status codes for failure cases improves debugging and makes API behavior easier to validate in a report.
